case_title: HARRIS, MELVINA vs. STOVALL, SAMMIE E. et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, MELVINA AS TO DEFENDANT STOVALL, SAMMIE E. STOVALL, ROSEMARY M. SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-03-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-04-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-14-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-03-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-03-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC RE CONTEMPT AGAINST PLT AND COUNSEL. HEARING SET FOR SEP-02-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-27-1993 Sweep; Adjudicated

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-1993 Continued To Sep-02-93 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 04
